appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance section for agent-browser with isolation rules, test account patterns, and evidence collection guidelines

systemicIssues.description: Supabase Auth rate limiting is aggressively blocking test user creation. All signup attempts return 'email rate limit exceeded' even with unique emails and 60+ second delays between attempts.
Supabase Auth returning 'Database error querying schema' on signin attempts, suggesting backend connectivity or schema issues.

notes: 6 out of 13 assertions passed. All passing assertions were for public pages or unauthenticated flows that don't require a working Supabase Auth signup.
The client-side validation (VAL-AUTH-009) works correctly, preventing empty form submissions with inline error messages.

The landing page (VAL-AUTH-001), protected route redirect (VAL-AUTH-006), mobile responsive layout (VAL-LAYOUT-002), invalid signin error (VAL-AUTH-007), and auth callback (VAL-LAYOUT-003) all function correctly.
7 assertions failed due to external dependencies (Supabase Auth rate limiting and database errors) rather than application bugs.
